name: android-sdk-platform-tools
title: android-sdk-platform-tools
summary: Tools for interacting with an Android platform
description:
Tools for interacting with an Android platform
The Android SDK includes a variety of tools that help you develop mobile
applications for the Android platform. The tools are classified into 3 groups:
SDK Tools, Platform-tools and Build-tools.
.
Platform-tools are customized to support the features of the latest Android
platform.
.
This package pulls Android SDK Platform-tools.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use android-sdk-platform-tools because Tools for interacting with an Android platform.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use android-sdk-platform-tools as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair android-sdk-platform-tools with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `android-sdk-platform-tools --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
